problem.title: Count Connected Components (Undirected Graph)
problem.description:
Problem Statement
Using DFS or BFS, count number of connected components.

Input Format
n m
edges

Output Format
Number of connected components.

Sample Input
6 3
1 2
2 3
5 6

Sample Output
3

Explanation
Components: {1,2,3}, {4}, {5,6}

solution.explanation: Build an adjacency matrix, run DFS from each unvisited vertex, and count how many times DFS starts – that is the number of connected components.
